summary: Model Manager list flashes on every re-sync. Root cause: renderList() full teardown+rebuild fires on state:changed(s_installedModelIds) + most download lifecycle events. Progress ticks already patch in place (fine). Fix: keyed/diff render like MpiQueuePanel; interim = signature-guard the s_installedModelIds handler. Surfaced during MPI-123. -> todo.

todo->doing. Scope decided: cheap signature-guard (not full keyed/diff). renderList() will short-circuit when the visible list signature (per-model installed-ops + draft + job-status) is unchanged, killing incidental flashing on every models:checked re-sync. Op-toggle/button state machine untouched.

maturity in-progress->validating. Fix shipped: renderList() now signature-guarded (_listSignature over per-model installed-ops + draft + job status/phase/indeterminate + idle-partial bucket, joined). Identical re-sync short-circuits (no teardown -> no flash); any real change still rebuilds once; toggle commit() uses force:true. download:progress in-place path untouched (active ticks collapse the sig, no churn). lint 0 errors. Self-check: 11-assert node logic test ALL PASS (collapse identical, discriminate section/installedOps/draft/job/partial, byte-jitter buckets). download-completion + resolve-model-deps suites green. AWAITING live app smoke: open Model Manager, start/cancel/complete a download, toggle an op -> confirm no flash on re-sync and toggle/button still snappy.

validating->done (complete/accepted). LIVE-VERIFIED local: Model Manager refresh after moving SDXL_Realistic.safetensors out of G:\CubricModels -> card re-sectioned to partial with NO flash. Install SDXL Realistic, cancel at ~1.2GB -> NO flicker, card reads clean 70MB/7.0GB PARTIALLY INSTALLED (70MB = pre-existing small shared deps, not stale). Disk confirmed: SDXL_Realistic.safetensors + .part GONE after cancel. Signature-guard (_listSignature short-circuits identical re-sync; real change still rebuilds once) confirmed killing the flash while preserving correct state transitions. Fix committed.
Archived from done column to .agents/mpi-kanban/tasks/_archive/MPI-124/ (board cleanup).
